title: myrosma australis
intro: Myrosma australis, also known as the New Zealand myrosma or 'Puka', is a plant species native to New Zealand and eastern Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain due to its high concentration of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of M. australis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of M. australis can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
